legal_description.value: Lot 61, SEVILLE PARCEL 3, according to Book 554 of Maps, Page 19, and Affidavit of Correction recorded in Instrument No. 01-849180, and in Instrument No. 01-984501, records of Maricopa County, Arizona
legal_description.source_note: Visually read from deed body, page 1. Note: this deed cites TWO affidavits — 01-849180 (in corpus as 20010849180) and 01-984501 (not in corpus; would be 20010984501).

vesting.value: A Married Woman as her Sole and Separate Property
vesting.source_note: Grantee vesting clause, page 1. Sole-and-separate vesting is why same-day DISCLAIMR (20070834754) was recorded — Aaron Lowry disclaimed community-property interest.

corpus_boundary_note: County online records searched through 2026-04-09. A same-day DISCLAIMR (20070834754) was recorded alongside this deed; Aaron Lowry disclaimed community-property interest to effect the sole-and-separate vesting. Disclaimer is not separately curated in this prototype corpus.
